underlying_goal: Enhance a neural search endpoint to accept tags as 'should' term boosts, add a confidence score percentage to results, and update the UI to support these changes
friction_detail: Claude used incorrect OpenSearch terms query syntax causing a 400 error, then over-complicated the fix with constant_score wrapping when a simple should/terms clause was what the user wanted.
brief_summary: User wanted to add tags support as 'should' boosts to a neural search endpoint plus a confidence score percentage; achieved after fixing an OpenSearch query syntax error and simplifying the approach per user feedback.
